title: benthamidia florida var. rubra
intro: Benthamidia florida var. rubra, also known as the Red Jessamine, is a variant of the Benthamidia florida plant, a type of flowering shrub native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The Red Jessamine is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and protecting against cardiovascular disease, due to its high content of flavonoids and alkaloids. Benthamidia florida var. rubra can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
